description_long: This is a mid-century modern style filing cabinet with a rich, dark wood finish and sleek, minimalist lines. The front features a combination of three wide horizontal drawers on the right and two vertically stacked drawers on the left, each with slim, horizontal recessed handles. The cabinet stands on four slender, angled legs, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain, while the top surface is flat and suitable for placing objects. The handles are integrated into the drawer faces, maintaining a streamlined look. This piece is both functional and stylish, suitable for organizing documents or office supplies in a professional or home setting.
description: A dark wood filing cabinet with five drawers and slim recessed handles, elevated on angled legs. Its modern, minimalist design features a flat top and a clean, streamlined appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing five drawers with horizontal recessed handles and the cabinet's full width.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wood panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wood surface with visible grain.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the cabinet's depth and the plain wood panel.
